debug_info.goal:
α : Type
language : ContextFreeLanguage α
h✝ : ε ∈ ↑language
⊢ ∃ n,
    ∀ (z : ↑{z | z ∈ ↑language ∧ z.len ≥ n}),
      ∃ u v w x y,
        ↑z = u * v * w * x * y ∧
          (v * x).len ≥ 1 ∧ (v * w * x).len ≤ n ∧ ∀ (k : ℕ), u * v ^ k * w * x ^ k * y ∈ ↑language

failed_attempts: sorry
sorry

sorry
    case neg h_no_eps =>
      obtain ⟨nt, cfg, h_cfg⟩ := language.2
      have h_cfg_no_eps : ε ∉ cfg.GeneratedLanguage := sorry
      obtain ⟨cfg_cnf, h_equiv⟩ := equivalent_CNF_Grammar α nt nt ⟨cfg, h_cfg_no_eps⟩
      sorry
sorry

refine ⟨n, fun ⟨z, hz, hlen⟩ => ?_⟩
      obtain ⟨u, v, w, x, y, h_eq, h_vx, h_vwx, h_pump⟩ := hn ⟨z, hz, by intro h; subst h; simp at hlen; linarith⟩
      exact ⟨u, v, w, x, y, h_eq, h_vx, h_vwx, fun k => (h_pump k).1⟩
sorry

obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := PumpingLemma ⟨fun w => language.1 w ∧ w ≠ ε, sorry⟩
      use n
      intro z
      obtain ⟨u, v, w, x, y, h_eq, h_vx, h_vwx, h_pump⟩ := hn ⟨z.1, ⟨z.2.1, sorry⟩, z.2.2⟩
      use u, v, w, x, y
      exact ⟨h_eq, h_vx, h_vwx, fun k => (h_pump k).1⟩

sorry
    case neg =>
      sorry

sorry
    case neg h_no_eps =>
      obtain ⟨nt, cfg, h_cfg⟩ := language.2
      obtain ⟨cfg_cnf, h_cnf⟩ := equivalent_CNF_Grammar α nt nt ⟨cfg, by rwa [h_cfg] at h_no_eps⟩
      use 2 ^ cfg_cnf.val.val.V.card + 1
      intro ⟨z, hz_mem, hz_len⟩
      obtain ⟨w, hw_mem, hw_coe⟩ := coerceCFGLang_mem_imp_word_of_type z cfg_cnf.1 (by rwa [h_cfg, h_cnf] at hz_mem)
      sorry
sorry
sorry

refine ⟨n, fun ⟨z, hz, hlen⟩ => ?_⟩
      have h_nz : z ≠ ε := by intro h; subst h; simp at hlen; cases hlen
      obtain ⟨u, v, w, x, y, hsz, hvx, hvwx, hpump⟩ := hn ⟨z, hz, hlen, h_nz⟩
      exact ⟨u, v, w, x, y, hsz, hvx, hvwx, hpump⟩
sorry

obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ : ∃ n, ∀ word : Word α, word ∈ ↑language → word.len ≥ n → ∃ u v w x y, word = u * v * w * x * y ∧ (v * x).len ≥ 1 ∧ (v * w * x).len ≤ n ∧ (∀ k : ℕ, u * v ^ k * w * x ^ k * y ∈ ↑language) := sorry
      obtain ⟨u, v, w, x, y, h_eq, h_vx, h_vwx, h_pump⟩ := hn z.val z.prop.1 z.prop.2
      exact ⟨u, v, w, x, y, h_eq, h_vx, h_vwx, h_pump⟩
    case neg h_not_eps =>
      sorry

sorry
    case neg =>
      sorry

have h_cf : (fun w => w ∈ language.val ∧ w ≠ ε).is_context_free := sorry
      obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := PumpingLemma ⟨_, h_cf⟩
      use n
      intro z
      have h_z : z.val ∈ (fun w => w ∈ language.val ∧ w ≠ ε) := ⟨z.2.1, by intro h; rw [h] at z; have := z.2.2; simp [h, Word.len] at this; linarith⟩
      obtain ⟨u, v, w, x, y, h_eq, h_vx, h_vwx, h_pump⟩ := hn ⟨z.val, h_z, z.2.2⟩
      use u, v, w, x, y
      exact ⟨h_eq, h_vx, h_vwx, fun k => (h_pump k).1⟩
    case neg h_neg =>
      sorry

sorry
    case neg h_neg =>
      obtain ⟨nt, cfg, h_cfg⟩ := language.2
      obtain ⟨cfgCNF, _⟩ := equivalent_CNF_Grammar α nt nt ⟨cfg, (coerceLang_not_mem _).mpr (h_cfg.symm ▸ h_neg)⟩
      exists 2 ^ cfgCNF.1.V.card
      sorry

obtain ⟨cfg_cnf, h_eq⟩ := equivalent_CNF_Grammar α nt nt ⟨CFG, sorry⟩
      let n := 2 ^ (cfg_cnf.1.V.card + 1)
      exists n
      intro z
      obtain ⟨u, v, w, x, y, h_split, h_vx, h_vwx, h_pump⟩ := sorry
      exact ⟨u, v, w, x, y, h_split, h_vx, h_vwx, h_pump⟩
    case neg =>
      obtain ⟨nt, CFG, h_gen⟩ := language.2
      obtain ⟨cfg_cnf, h_eq⟩ := equivalent_CNF_Grammar α nt nt ⟨CFG, sorry⟩
      let n := 2 ^ (cfg_cnf.1.V.card + 1)
      exists n
      intro z
      obtain ⟨u, v, w, x, y, h_split, h_vx, h_vwx, h_pump⟩ := sorry
      exact ⟨u, v, w, x, y, h_split, h_vx, h_vwx, h_pump⟩

obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ : ∃ n, ∀ z : {z | z ∈ language.val ∧ z.len ≥ n ∧ z ≠ ε}, ∃ u v w x y, z.1 = u * v * w * x * y ∧ (v * x).len ≥ 1 ∧ (v * w * x).len ≤ n ∧ ∀ k, u * v ^ k * w * x ^ k * y ∈ language.val := sorry
      exact ⟨n, λ z => hn ⟨z.1, z.2.1, z.2.2, sorry⟩⟩

sorry
    case neg =>
      sorry
sorry

obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := PumpingLemma ⟨λ w => w ∈ language.val ∧ w ≠ ε, sorry⟩
      exact ⟨n, λ z => let ⟨u,v,w,x,y,h⟩ := hn ⟨z.1, ⟨z.2.1, sorry⟩, z.2.2⟩; ⟨u,v,w,x,y, h.1, h.2.1, h.2.2.1, λ k => (h.2.2.2 k).1⟩⟩
    case neg h_neg =>
      obtain ⟨nt, cfg, h_cfg⟩ := language.2
      obtain ⟨nt2, cfg_cnf, h_cnf⟩ := equivalent_CNF_Grammar α nt nt ⟨cfg, sorry⟩
      sorry

obtain ⟨n, h_n⟩ := PumpingLemma ⟨{w | w ∈ language.val ∧ w ≠ ε}, sorry⟩
      use n; intro z
      obtain ⟨u, v, w, x, y, h_split, h_vx, h_vwx, h_pump⟩ := h_n ⟨z.1, ⟨z.2.1, fun h => by simp [h, Word.eps_len_0] at z; linarith [z.2.2]⟩, z.2.2⟩
      use u, v, w, x, y; exact ⟨h_split, h_vx, h_vwx, fun k => (h_pump k).1⟩
    case neg h =>
      sorry

sorry
    case neg =>
      -- The pumping lemma for L where ε ∉ L is proven using its Chomsky Normal Form.
      -- The constant n = 2^|V| ensures derivation trees are tall enough to have repeating variables.
      sorry

sorry
    case neg =>
      sorry

sorry
    case neg =>
      sorry

sorry
    case neg =>
      -- For ε ∉ L, we can transform the grammar into CNF and use the derivation tree properties.
      sorry
sorry

obtain ⟨nt', cfg', h_cfg'⟩ := (⟨fun w => w ∈ language.val ∧ w ≠ ε, sorry⟩ : ContextFreeLanguage α).2
      obtain ⟨cfg_cnf, _⟩ := equivalent_CNF_Grammar α nt' nt' ⟨cfg', sorry⟩
      use 2 ^ cfg_cnf.1.V.card + 1; intro z; sorry
    case neg =>
      obtain ⟨nt, cfg, h_cfg⟩ := language.2
      obtain ⟨cfg_cnf, _⟩ := equivalent_CNF_Grammar α nt nt ⟨cfg, by rwa [h_cfg]⟩
      use 2 ^ cfg_cnf.1.V.card + 1; intro z; sorry

use n; intro ⟨z, h_mem, h_len⟩
      obtain ⟨u, v, w, x, y, h_split, h_vx, h_vwx, h_pump⟩ := hn ⟨z, ⟨h_mem, sorry⟩, h_len⟩
      use u, v, w, x, y
      exact ⟨h_split, h_vx, h_vwx, fun k => (h_pump k).1⟩

sorry
      obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := PumpingLemma ⟨language_no_eps, h_cf⟩
      exists n
      intro z
      obtain ⟨z_val, z_mem, z_len⟩ := z
      have z_ne_eps : z_val ≠ ε := by
        intro h_eq
        rw [h_eq, Word.eps_len_0] at z_len
        -- Since n ≥ 1 (as established by the Pumping Lemma for non-empty languages)
        sorry
      obtain ⟨u, v, w, x, y, h_split, h_vx, h_vwx, h_pump⟩ := hn ⟨z_val, ⟨z_mem, z_ne_eps⟩, z_len⟩
      exists u, v, w, x, y
      exact ⟨h_split, h_vx, h_vwx, fun k => (h_pump k).1⟩

sorry
    case neg =>
      -- Main case: ε ∉ L. We can use a Chomsky Normal Form grammar.
      obtain ⟨nt, cfg, h_cfg⟩ := language.is_context_free
      have h_cfg_no_eps : ε ∉ cfg.GeneratedLanguage := by
        rw [coerceLang_not_mem] at h_eps; rwa [h_cfg] at h_eps
      obtain ⟨cfg_cnf, h_cnf_eq⟩ := equivalent_CNF_Grammar α nt nt ⟨cfg, h_cfg_no_eps⟩
      let n := 2 ^ cfg_cnf.1.V.card
      use n
      intro z
      sorry
